data.description: The languages I've coded in, from daily drivers to deep coursework.

skills.name: JavaScript
skills.notes: no frameworks between me and it here. every behavior on this site is hand-written js.

skills.name: HTML
skills.notes: written by hand. no templating engines, no generators.

skills.name: CSS
skills.notes: the crt overlay, the tui layout, every palette switch — all css.

skills.name: TypeScript
skills.notes: used across trm's frontend codebase. js's upgrade when a team's in the repo.

skills.name: Python
skills.origin: a&m coursework, then the twitter bot
skills.notes: where the bot's decision logic lives.

skills.name: C++
skills.origin: a&m, where a chess assignment started all this
skills.notes: where i learned what memory actually costs.

skills.name: SQL
skills.notes: designed the schema and wrote the fifteen queries running live in the demo, relational division included.

skills.name: C
skills.notes: memory management and systems work. solid enough, distant enough.

skills.name: Java
skills.notes: solid oop foundations. would sharpen fast.

skills.name: Bash
skills.notes: enough to be useful on the command line and in server scripts.

data.description: What I've built on top of.

skills.name: React
skills.notes: role-based dashboards, responsive ui, and features built directly with the platform owner.

skills.name: Tailwind CSS
skills.notes: with flowbite components on top. fast to build with once you stop fighting the classnames.

skills.name: Express
skills.notes: api routing and jwt middleware — the first lock on trm's security layer.

skills.name: Node.js
skills.notes: the runtime behind trm's backend.

data.description: The tools and platforms I reach for.

skills.name: Supabase
skills.notes: row-level security policies — the second lock on trm's security layer.

skills.name: Clerk
skills.notes: role-based auth and dynamic routing — each user lands exactly where their role allows.

skills.name: MySQL
skills.notes: the relational database running live on this site.

skills.name: Selenium
skills.notes: browser automation chosen deliberately over the api.

skills.name: Git
skills.notes: version control across every project on this site. embarrassingly, i started later than i should have.

skills.name: Jira
skills.notes: sprint tracking and task coordination across the trm team.

skills.name: VSCode
skills.notes: primary editor. everything on this site was written here.

data.description: Tools for making things look the way I mean them to.

skills.name: UI/UX Design
skills.notes: the tui aesthetic, the colour system, the control panel layout — design is how this site found its voice.

skills.name: Figma
skills.notes: wireframing and prototyping before building.

skills.name: Krita
skills.origin: digital art, long before the code
skills.notes: where this site's logo was drawn before my converter got hold of it.

skills.name: Photoshop
skills.notes: image editing and compositing. krita handles the drawing now.
